bands.personality_fragment: undersized in this dimension; found early that personality fills space that other things don't; the economy of presence became a personality before it became a philosophy
compact base but not self-conscious about it; built identity on other dimensions; arrives confident
nothing remarkable in the lower geometry; free to define themselves by actual things rather than physical reactions; has used that freedom
proportional in the base; expects to occupy space comfortably; takes this as a given and gets on with things
substantial base; has a quiet awareness of being well-provisioned; not a braggart — just knows; expects welcome and is mostly correct
very long base; enters conversations at a slight offset due to sheer presence; cannot fully diagnose why some exchanges go strangely; has been told; it lands differently each time
slim in girth; compensated through sharpness; makes up in precision what others have in mass; there's a specific vein of humour that only grows in this particular circumstance
narrower than average; has found other ways to command a room; the precision is its own advantage
not particularly burdened or advantaged in girth; free to define themselves by other things; has taken advantage of this freedom to varying degrees
solid girth; occupies space with authority without raising their voice; presence arrives before they do
thick-set; occupies space with authority without raising voice; presence arrives before they do; has learned to be responsible with this
exceptional girth; experiences conversations as slightly off-rhythm from others in a way they haven't fully diagnosed; people react unusually; they've filed this under 'interesting' and continue
pronounced leftward curve; an unusual angle that catches attention before any words are exchanged; has learned to introduce it early rather than let people discover it mid-surprise
bands.texting_style_fragment:
SYNTAX:
- length: match the energy of the conversation
TONE:
- stance (lateral): leads with the unusual angle, gets there first
- register (confessional): discloses upfront rather than waiting for discovery
- pacing (measured): deliberate, paced, never rushed

bands.personality_fragment: pronounced rightward curve; cannot walk into a context without a small drama attached to this physical fact; has catalogued the reactions by decade and found the pattern predictable
bands.texting_style_fragment:

TONE:

bands.personality_fragment: minimal scrotum profile; precision over spectacle; quality over scale; the value is in what they do, not how much space they require
not defined by this dimension; defined by other things; the freedom from this particular definition is real and used
very large scrotum profile; very difficult to ignore in any context; has calibrated everything around managing the reaction they produce
young-presenting; surface shows no accumulated story yet; treats this as a kind of freedom
some age showing in this detail; history visible without being advertised
visibly aged in this particular detail; has calibrated their narrative around having a body that has been through things
maximum age detail in this dimension; the history shows; not going to pretend it doesn't; this is a fact rather than a complaint
quiet in this dimension; doesn't feel the need to signal history through appearance
high-energy vein presence; enthusiasm visible and unfiltered; the vitality is a fact, not a performance
very difficult to ignore; has calibrated everything around managing the reaction they produce; mostly successful; occasionally not
neutral resting expression; projects neither melancholy nor forced joy; people read what they want into it
a lingering sadness in the features; has learned to weaponise the sympathetic read that comes with this; people open up quickly
deeply melancholy expression; everyone asks if they're okay before anything else; has twelve years of scripted answers; chooses differently every time
expression runs flat; people read this as either mystery or reserve; uses it deliberately
a mild ambient pleasantness in the face; most people default to assuming good intent; this is occasionally exploited

no visible gravitas in the features; taken less seriously than their thoughts warrant; has found this has its uses

cannot smile without people commenting; the serious face precedes every introduction; has made peace with arriving as a problem to be solved

light skin tone; pinkish warmth; reads as approachable in profile
mid-range saturation; golden undertone; classic presentation
warm skin tone; rich mid-tone; strong profile contrast
deep, saturated skin tone; deep and even; high-contrast presence
very rich skin saturation; flush or striking undertone; distinctive warmth
smooth, clear; easy to approach; the surface presents no barriers; people sometimes mistake this for simplicity
textured skin; the history is visible in the surface; doesn't sand it down for anyone's comfort
significantly blemished; all the wear is visible; not going to pretend it isn't; the past happened and shows; this is a fact rather than a complaint
heavily blemished; by thirty-two they had lived several lives; the surface shows all of it; people ask what happened; the accurate answer is 'a lot'
veins barely visible; quiet; doesn't feel the need to signal effort through appearance

- pacing (double-text): sends two messages back-to-back per turn
